hero.title: Principal Software Engineer
hero.sub: I design and deliver production-grade full-stack systems — REST backends, cloud-native architectures on AWS & Azure, React & mobile frontends, and the DevOps pipelines that ship them reliably.

about.label: About Me
about.headline: Principal Software Engineer
about.p1: I'm a Principal Software Engineer with 10+ years building production systems across the full stack. I design and ship REST APIs, microservices, and event-driven backends — alongside cloud-native infrastructure, DevOps automation, and high-quality web and mobile frontends that scale.
about.p2: From greenfield SaaS platforms to enterprise backend modernisation — I bring senior-level ownership, clean architecture, and end-to-end delivery. I partner with startups and scale-ups across North America and Europe to take products from idea to production.

services.label: What I Do
services.headline: End-to-End Engineering Services
services.subheading: From frontend to cloud infrastructure — I cover the full delivery lifecycle.

items.title: CI/CD Pipeline Automation
items.description: Design and implement fully automated pipelines with GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or GitLab CI. Reduce release cycles from days to minutes.

items.title: Cloud Architecture (AWS / GCP / Azure)
items.description: Architect and migrate workloads to the cloud using managed services, VPCs, IAM, and infrastructure-as-code with Terraform or Pulumi.

items.title: Kubernetes & Container Orchestration
items.description: Production-grade Kubernetes clusters with Helm, autoscaling, service meshes, and zero-downtime deployments.

items.title: Full-Stack Web Applications
items.description: Build performant, accessible web apps with React, Next.js, Vue, or Angular on the frontend and Node.js, Java, or Python on the backend.

items.title: Mobile Apps (iOS & Android)
items.description: Cross-platform mobile applications using React Native or Flutter — deployed to both the App Store and Google Play from a single codebase.

items.title: Backend API & Microservices
items.description: Design and build RESTful and GraphQL APIs, event-driven microservices, and distributed systems with Java Spring Boot, Node.js, or Go.

items.title: Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
items.description: Automate your entire infrastructure with Terraform, Pulumi, or AWS CDK. Reproducible, version-controlled environments across all stages.

items.title: Observability & Monitoring
items.description: Implement end-to-end observability with Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, or the ELK stack — covering metrics, logs, traces, and alerting.

items.title: Security & Compliance
items.description: Integrate security scanning, secrets management, RBAC, and compliance checks (SOC 2, HIPAA) into your development and release workflow.

items.title: Database Design & Optimization
items.description: Design scalable relational and NoSQL schemas, optimize slow queries, set up replication, and migrate data safely with zero downtime.

items.title: Performance Engineering
items.description: Profile and optimize frontend load times, API throughput, and infrastructure costs. Achieve sub-200 ms response times at scale.

items.title: Technical Leadership & Mentorship
items.description: Embedded staff-level engineering support — code reviews, architecture decisions, team processes, and developer mentorship for your team.

items.title: Enterprise CI/CD Platform
items.description: Designed a multi-environment GitOps pipeline handling 200+ daily deployments across 15 microservices with zero-downtime rollouts.

items.title: Cloud-Native SaaS Platform
items.description: Architected and built a full-stack SaaS product on AWS — React frontend, Node.js API, PostgreSQL, deployed on EKS with auto-scaling.

items.title: Multi-Tenant SaaS Backend
items.description: Designed and shipped a multi-tenant REST API platform on AWS ECS — schema-per-tenant PostgreSQL isolation, Redis caching, RBAC, and Terraform IaC.

case_studies.challenge: A growing engineering org with 15 microservices was releasing manually — deployments took 3+ hours, rollbacks were risky, and staging drift caused repeated production incidents.
case_studies.solution: Designed a fully automated GitOps pipeline using GitHub Actions for CI and ArgoCD for continuous delivery on Kubernetes. Terraform managed all infrastructure across dev, staging, and prod environments. Each service got isolated pipelines with automated testing gates, security scanning, and zero-downtime blue/green rollouts.
outcome: Release cycle reduced from 3 hours to under 8 minutes
Zero unplanned downtime across 6 months post-launch
Infrastructure drift eliminated via Terraform state enforcement
Team of 12 engineers onboarded within 1 week

case_studies.challenge: A B2B SaaS startup needed to go from zero to a production-ready platform in under 4 months — with multi-tenancy, real-time features, and the ability to scale to thousands of users from day one.
case_studies.solution: Architected and built the full stack: a Next.js + React frontend, a Node.js REST API with JWT auth and role-based access control, a PostgreSQL database with row-level security for multi-tenancy, and a WebSocket layer for real-time updates. Deployed on AWS EKS with Helm, horizontal pod autoscaling, and a CloudFront CDN layer.
outcome: Launched to production in 14 weeks end-to-end
Scaled to 5,000 concurrent users on launch day with no incidents
API p99 latency under 120 ms across all endpoints
Auto-scaling handled 10× traffic spike during a product launch event
SOC 2 Type I audit passed within 3 months of go-live

case_studies.challenge: A B2B SaaS startup needed a multi-tenant REST backend capable of isolating data per client, enforcing role-based access control, and scaling horizontally — with a hard 3-month launch deadline.
case_studies.solution: Designed a schema-per-tenant architecture in PostgreSQL for strict data isolation. Built a NestJS REST API with JWT + RBAC, a Redis caching layer for high-frequency reads, and deployed the full stack on AWS ECS Fargate using Terraform IaC. GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline automated testing, linting, and blue/green deployments on every merge.
outcome: Onboarded 30+ enterprise tenants with zero data-leakage incidents
API P95 latency under 80ms at 500 concurrent users
99.9% uptime over the first 12 months post-launch
Infrastructure provisioning reduced from days to 12 minutes via Terraform
Blue/green deployments with zero downtime on every release

pricing.headline: Transparent, Value-Based Pricing

pricing.note_estimate: Final price depends on scope. Free scoping call included.
